test.question: Which of the following is a defining feature of all living organisms?

options: only upto a certain age, continuously
continuously, only upto a certain age
only upto a certain age in both

test.question: Which two of the below are twin characteristics of growth?
options: Increase in mass and number of individuals
Increase in individuals and cellular differentiation
